subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the story of Tenali Rama and King Krishnadeva Raya
Learn the importance of wit and humour in solving problems
Identify the main characters and events in the story
Understand how misunderstandings can lead to conflicts
Recognize how clever thinking can resolve disagreements
Develop reading comprehension and vocabulary skills

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Wit and Humour
topics_covered: Importance of humour in daily life
student_activities: Select qualities of a witty person from the given list

lesson_plan.title: Background of the Story
topics_covered: Tenali Rama as a witty advisor
student_activities: Read the introduction of the story

lesson_plan.title: Understanding the Conflict
topics_covered: Misunderstanding between the king and queen
student_activities: Explain why the king became angry
Discuss how misunderstandings can occur in daily life

lesson_plan.title: Tenali Rama’s Clever Strategy
topics_covered: Tenali Rama’s idea of special paddy seeds
How he used wit to explain the situation
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of the court scene

lesson_plan.title: Resolution and Moral
student_activities: Write the moral of the story
Share personal examples of solving problems wisely

lesson_plan.title: Language and Revision Activities
student_activities: Form compound words from the given list

teacher_tip: Encourage students to act out the court scene between Tenali Rama and the king. This helps students better understand how wit and humour can resolve misunderstandings.
